response.justification: Maria is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine systems and tooling depth (D language test runners, an IDE role at National Instruments, high-throughput low-latency services), but her profile misses the core requirements of this role. Her career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms rather than Java/Kotlin, and there is no evidence of Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, application servers, or deep JVM expertise. The IDE experience (LabWindows/CVI, C/C++) is relevant in spirit but brief, dated (2014–2015), and outside the JVM ecosystem.
strengths: Prior IDE development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI) plus authored developer tooling (test runner, assertion library)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and community teaching/workshops
Broad polyglot experience including low-latency, high-scale systems work
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only minor, dated Java exposure — the role's primary languages
No Spring or enterprise JVM framework experience (Hibernate, Quarkus, application servers)
Recent work (TypeScript/Node.js product and AI tooling) is far from JVM internals and enterprise IDE subsystems
